refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall maintain teleoperation link availability at or above the customer-defined target throughout the operational period.
refined_fr.rationale: Refining the original FR clarifies the performance metric (link availability) and ties it explicitly to the customer-defined target and operational timeframe, enabling measurable verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure link uptime statistics over the evaluation period using telemetry data and compare against the customer-defined availability target.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor teleoperation link status continuously.
FR2: Detect and recover from link failures promptly.
FR3: Report link availability metrics to stakeholders.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement redundant communication channels with automatic failover.
DP2: Use real-time link health monitoring and predictive failure detection algorithms.
DP3: Provide link status reporting and alerting mechanisms.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Implement redundant communication channels with automatic failover.

potential_sources: Link monitoring tightly coupled with failover logic
Reporting interfaces dependent on link status data
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically supports the FR with manageable coupling between monitoring, failover, and reporting functions.

assumptions_risks: Risk of increased system complexity impacting maintainability.
Assumes failover mechanisms do not introduce unacceptable latency.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating predictive failure detection (DP2) in future refinement to enhance robustness.

im_boundary.name: Teleoperation
im_boundary.scope: Responsible for communication link management, failover mechanisms, and link status reporting.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Sends link status and availability metrics to NGHE Solution and Safety Services.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Handles physical and logical communication channels for teleoperation.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives teleoperation commands from NGHE Solution.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment of link availability functions; low diffusion risk due to centralized communication management.
Vehicle module depends on link status but does not contain link management logic.
Receives alerts but does not manage link availability.
Coordinates overall system but link availability logic is better centralized in Teleoperation.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing link availability management in the Teleoperation module minimizes diffusion and improves maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential single point of failure if Teleoperation module is compromised.
Integration complexity with other modules requiring link status data.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Evaluate failover redundancy within Teleoperation to mitigate single point of failure risk.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP (redundant communication channels with failover) directly addresses the refined FR and supports measurable verification.

diffusion_risks: Minimal diffusion risk as link availability logic is centralized in Teleoperation.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support Teleoperation as the best ownership candidate.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification via telemetry data and operational testing is feasible within the Teleoperation module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of link availability responsibility to Teleoperation module.

recommended_revisions: Consider adding predictive failure detection DP in next refinement level.
Assess failover redundancy within Teleoperation to reduce single point of failure risk.

decision.justification: While the current decomposition is sound, incorporating predictive failure detection and explicit failover redundancy will strengthen the design and reduce risks.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor teleoperation link status continuously.
FR2: Detect and recover from link failures promptly.
FR3: Report link availability metrics to stakeholders.

revise.why: To include predictive failure detection and enhance failover mechanisms for improved link availability.

assumptions: Failover mechanisms operate within acceptable latency.
open_risks: Single point of failure risk in Teleoperation module.
evidence_needed: Telemetry data demonstrating link availability ≥ 0.999 over evaluation period.
Failover performance metrics under simulated failure conditions.
